design_philosophy: Functional clarity, technical precision, and high-stakes environment. No playful shapes (pill-buttons). Sharp, authoritative, and data-first.

geometry.description: Strict adherence to slightly softened sharp edges (6px / 0.375rem). Pill shapes are strictly forbidden to maintain a professional, trading-terminal aesthetic.

header.layout: Flex container with horizontal alignment. Items should be vertically centered.
header.structure: [Logo] -> [Navigation Links: Arena, Duels, Analyst Leagues] -> [Search Bar] -> [Create Market (Secondary CTA)] -> [Connect Wallet (Primary CTA)]
header.styling: border-b border-white/10 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl sticky top-0 z-50 px-6 py-4
header.spacing: gap-6 or gap-8 between major groups.

connect_wallet.styling: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

create_market.styling: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

sort_filters.styling: bg-transparent text-secondary-foreground hover:text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-sm transition-colors border border-transparent hover:bg-white/5

live_badge.styling: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-bold bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20 uppercase tracking-wider

search.placement: Inline within the header navigation, next to Nav Links.
search.styling: relative flex items-center bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 focus-within:border-primary transition-colors min-w-[240px]
search.input_styling: bg-transparent border-none outline-none text-sm text-white placeholder:text-white/40 w-full ml-2

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Locate the Header component file (e.g., Header.js, Navbar.js).
2. Move the Search Bar component inside the main Header flex container, placing it after the navigation links (Arena, Duels, etc.) and before the CTA buttons.
3. Fix the CTA hierarchy: Find the 'Connect Wallet' and 'Create Market' buttons. Change 'Connect Wallet' to use solid primary styling. Change 'Create Market' to use secondary/outline styling.

4. Enforce geometry: Search globally (or in the relevant components) for 'rounded-full', 'rounded-xl', 'rounded-2xl', 'rounded-3xl' on Buttons, Badges, and Sort Filters. Replace ALL of them with 'rounded-md'.
5. Specifically update the 'Q1 2026 Live' badge to use 'rounded-md' instead of any pill shape.
6. Specifically update the Sort By buttons (Trending, Newest, Volume, Most Bets) to use 'rounded-md'.
7. Ensure all modified interactive elements include the specified data-testid attributes.
